# J11 Correction Quality Bench

## Answers

1. Successful measurements: `30/30` rows.
2. J1 dx error ratio: before=`0.979656259438`, after=`0.118964381374`. Improved rows overall=`30/30`.
3. J1 theta error ratio: before=`0.987866629569`, after=`0.0591446000175`.
4. J1 |V| error ratio: before=`0.85960549339`, after=`0.85960549339`. J11 correction does not directly change |V|, so this should stay fixed.
5. J1 residual ratio: total before=`0.332264476373`, after=`0.314988515077`; P before=`0.691417424957`, after=`6.60041426393e-13`; Q before=`0.342946087171`, after=`0.380587346471`.
6. J1 J11 cuDSS factorize+solve mean=`0.6283793` ms.

## Notes

- Baseline is CPU-pilot BiCGSTAB(2) + METIS block-Jacobi, no coarse/scaling/warm-start/block-ILU.
- Correction solves `J11 dtheta_corr = F_P - J_P dx0` with cuDSS and leaves |V| unchanged.
- This is a standalone J/F quality test only; no hybrid NR policy is run.
